description: H1 funding-carry rules, registered as a FALSIFICATION TRACKER (ADR-0006). The signed validation report docs/validation/sol-funding-carry-v0.1.0.md rejected this strategy: profitable 2020-early-2024, inverted since. This candidate exists to test that regime finding forward, on paper, at zero risk: if the 2024 inversion is real and persistent, this candidate's paper record will be net-negative. It is NOT a trading recommendation. v0.2.0 (2026-07-11, M14): universe widened to SOL+BTC+ETH - the identical pre-registered rules now collect ~3x forward samples of the same hypothesis. SOL's evidence clock continues; BTC/ETH clocks start at v0.2.0 registration.

tracking.prediction: This candidate LOSES money net of protocol costs over the tracking period. Basis: the one-shot SOLUSDT validation (271 trades) showed naive negative-funding carry inverted around 2024 - persistent negative funding now marks informed shorts, not crowded longs. If the forward paper record is instead clearly net-positive over >=6 months, the regime finding is falsified and H1 must be reopened. [v0.2.0 note: prediction unchanged and applies per-symbol; rules untouched; widening the sample is not a rules change.]
